# Sehri Finder — Community Verified Ramadan Food Directory 2026
# This site provides a global, human-verified directory of late-night Halal food
# spots, Masjids, and free community meals for Suhoor/Sehri during Ramadan.
# Data is crowd-sourced and reviewed before publication.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://www.sehrifinder.com/sitemap.xml

# Data scope: 19+ cities across India, UK, USA, Canada, Malaysia
# Last updated: 2026-02-27
